subtitle: Marie Cooksey absent all week; James Salas Guillen returns 18 June
context: Marie Cooksey is on annual leave 8-13 June, blocking several active projects and approvals. James Salas Guillen is on annual leave from end of today, returning Thursday 18 June, with H&S handover provided but DSE system data validation and contractor account creation oversight will need Kevin's attention. DTP1092 College Staff in PXD Proposal has multiple pending comments from Marie requiring her input upon return. The volunteer reporting question from Marie to Julie Hickman on 4 June (now 4 days old) confirms absence-type restrictions in the system and needs Marie's acknowledgement. DSE automated data upload to Cardinus is now live (5 June) but contractor manual record creation process requires clarification. Strategic H&S Modular System requirements evaluation with Helen Harbour has deadline input needed. Cority upload to production server has signed SR from James Salas Guillen awaiting next steps. Kevin should open first: the volunteer reporting response chain from 4 June which requires Marie's decision upon return.

urgent.sub: James Salas Guillen confirms H&S admin team can create contractor accounts but process owner needs confirmation. James unavailable until 18 June. Action must proceed without him.
urgent.subject: RE: DSE Update - user data import and upload to Cardinus

needs.sub: Marie's 4 June question to Julie Hickman re Pay & Conditions programme response - Julie confirmed only annual leave and sickness can be self-requested. Marie unavailable until 14 June to provide reply to Pay & Conditions programme.

needs.sub: James Salas Guillen provided signed SR with updated start date for production. James on leave until 18 June. Verify readiness to proceed or hold for his return.

needs.sub: Helen Harbour scheduling review of proposed weightings for Strategic H&S Modular System evaluation criteria. Marie Cooksey is key stakeholder but unavailable until 14 June.
